label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking why the visitor came to John's house. The options are to steal something, read the story, have a drink, or visit the writer. Looking at the passage... John finds out that someone broke into his house. The visitor had a drink, smoked his cigarettes, and read his story. The note the visitor left says that they don't think the story is very good and gave suggestions. The visitor also mentions they are a thief but didn't steal anything that night. The main thing is the note says they are a thief and that they came to give feedback
